title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-10
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-10

## Focus for Today
Revenue-first execution for Vancouver real estate:
1) warm lead follow-up
2) past-client referral activation
3) one consumer-facing local market post
4) COI outreach + coffee booking

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (8)

**Message A (timeline check):**
"Hey [Name] — quick pulse check: are you still aiming to [buy/sell] this spring, or has your timing shifted? I can send a quick Vancouver micro-market snapshot so your next step is clear."

**Message B (call conversion):**
"If you’re still active, want to do a 10-minute game-plan call this week? I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (5)

"Hey [Name] — hope you’re doing great. Quick ask: if anyone in your circle needs advice about buying/selling in Vancouver this year, I’m happy to help zero-pressure. If useful, I can also send a short neighborhood value update this week."

## 3) Consumer Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Most Vancouver sellers lose leverage before they even list."

**Post draft:**
"3 mistakes Vancouver homeowners make before listing:\n\n1) Renovating the wrong rooms first\n2) Pricing from emotion instead of live micro-comps\n3) Waiting too long to prep photos + launch assets\n\nIf you want, comment ‘LIST’ and I’ll send the pre-listing checklist I use with clients."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m building a tighter Vancouver referral circle (mortgage/legal/inspection) so buyers and sellers get better support. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what clients are struggling with most in 2026?"

## 5) End-of-Day Scorecard

Track and log:
- Warm follow-ups sent: _ / 8
- Past-client check-ins sent: _ / 5
- Consumer posts published: _ / 1
- COI intros sent: _ / 3
- Coffee chats booked: _ / 1
- Replies received: _
- Calls booked: _
